title: What is the predefined business logic within a blockchain called?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
What is the predefined business logic within a blockchain called?


smart contracts


encrypting


mobile contracts


hashing

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
As Accenture explores an end-to-end business flow that has reconciliation between multiple parties, what would we uncover?


transparency


shared state


ownership


trapped value

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
What is a core domain for Accenture’s Multi-party Systems practice?


social networking


digital identity


marketing responsiveness


employee retention

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
What is one of the reasons to consider implementing a blockchain solution?


ability to verify that data has not been tampered with since its creation


ability to work on different versions of the same data


inability to track simultaneous updates by multiple users


inability to trace and access data of other users

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: ability to verify that data has not been tampered with since its creation

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
What is Accenture's role in Multi-party Systems?


consulting on new technologies for investment purposes


developing a messaging solution between two companies


helping ecosystems reimagine their processes to unlock value


helping a single company develop a data ingress platform

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: helping ecosystems reimagine their processes to unlock value.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
A company wishes to begin the process of implementing a Multi-party System and is looking for other companies with similar interests to join them. With blockchain, every organization sees the same data.

What does this provide?


trust


ownership


intent


uniqueness
